violations.text: Chickpea salad was observed at 51 degrees Fahrenheit in the ICS salad bar for service. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per PIC, the chickpea salad had just been prepared and mixed with room temperature ingredients. Food item was moved to freezer to rapidly cool prior to service. Food must be 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below prior to placing for service in salad bar. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/09/2026

The individual cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 03/09/2026
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the milk cooler in ICS cafeteria. Refrigerator door gaskets shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/08/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils can opener, and slicer were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Can opener and slicer were cleaned at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2025

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was observed over 400 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 200-300 ppm. Establishment is to dilute the sanitizing solution with water, to correct the sanitizing solution to the proper concentration. Establishment is to have the sanitizing solution serviced. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2025

Dishes and utensils were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Utensils were moved at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2024

Various foods in the walk-in cooler were observed held between 46-50 degrees Fahrenheit. Ambient of walk-in cooler was observed held at 50 DF. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Foods were voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection. Unit was serviced at the time of inspection and the walk-in cooler was observed holding an ambient temperature of 38 DF. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2024
The gasket for the milk chest cooler on the high school service line was observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/30/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (deli slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2024
Refrigerator door gasket on the milk case high school service area was observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of dishwasher have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 03/02/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the wall behind the dishwasher have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 10/19/2023

The presence of flys is not controlled as evidenced by the observance of flys. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Corrective Action - Establishment is to work with pest control. New Violation. Correct By: 05/22/2023

The outside dumpster has a broken cover. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. Corrective Action - Establishment is to obtain an unbroken cover, New Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2023

The floors in the BlackStone serving area are constructed of concrete which is not durable, easily cleanable, or non-absorbent. The materials for indoor floors must be durable, easily cleanable and nonabsorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. Corrective Action - The concrete in the serving area is no longer smooth durable and easily cleanable. The flooring must be repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 09/01/2023
